message:
feat(llm): add stream read timeout (30s default) per unified LLM spec

Implements AdapterTimeout.stream_read from the spec — if no data arrives
between consecutive stream chunks within the timeout, a retryable
StreamReadTimeoutError is thrown. Applied centrally in Client.stream()
so all providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini) get it automatically.

Configurable via ClientOptions.streamReadTimeoutMs. Set to 0 to disable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
